ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is registered */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year of the company's IPO */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company operates in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector it belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed (e.g., company ID) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., company, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price at the time of recording */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening stock price on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest stock price on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest stock price on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing stock price on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is about */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Full text of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
